overview: Based on the published agenda, the Community Life, Infrastructure and Public Property (CLIPP) Committee of Kronenwetter was scheduled to meet on June 1, 2026, to address multiple infrastructure and community projects including rehabilitation bids, municipal garage proposals, and park development. The meeting was set to include reports from police, fire, and public works leadership alongside discussion of ongoing village property initiatives.
committee: Community Life, Infrastructure and Public Property (CLIPP) Committee

agenda.item: Approval of May 4, 2026 CLIPP Committee Meeting Minutes
Trails and Leisure for Village Owned Property on Lea Rd.

discussions.item: Approval of May 4, 2026 CLIPP Committee Meeting Minutes
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to review and consider approval of minutes from the previous CLIPP meeting held on May 4, 2026.
The Police Chief was expected to provide a report to the committee on departmental matters and public safety issues affecting the Village of Kronenwetter.
The Fire Chief was scheduled to present a report on fire department operations and emergency services activities in the village.
The Public Works Director was set to provide an update on village infrastructure, maintenance projects, and public works operations.
The committee was scheduled to discuss and consider possible action on rehabilitation bids related to the Flanner/Jamroz project, which carried forward from previous meetings as old business.
The committee was set to review and discuss building proposals for a municipal garage facility as new business, with possible action anticipated.
An update on fundraising efforts for Buska Park was expected to be presented, allowing the committee to consider the status of this community project.
The committee was scheduled to discuss matters related to the Kronenwetter Parks Committee as part of new business.

discussions.item: Trails and Leisure for Village Owned Property on Lea Rd.
discussions.body: The committee was set to discuss potential trails and leisure amenities for village-owned property located on Lea Road, with possible action to follow.

publicComment: Public comment was scheduled for up to 15 minutes total, with a three-minute time period per person and discretionary time extension available from the Chief Presiding Officer.
actionItems: Expected to consider approval of May 4, 2026 CLIPP Committee Meeting Minutes
Scheduled to discuss and take possible action on Kronenwetter Flanner/Jamroz Rehabilitation Bids
Expected to consider Municipal Garage Building Proposals
Scheduled to review Buska Park Fundraising Update
Expected to discuss Kronenwetter Parks Committee matters
Scheduled to discuss and consider possible action on Trails and Leisure for Village Owned Property on Lea Rd.
title: Community Life, Infrastructure and Public Property (CLIPP) Committee Meeting - 2026-06-01
